features: Flexible and Comfortable: Made from soft, breathable fabric that conforms to the movement of your skin, providing superior comfort and flexibility.

Strong Adhesion: Features a gentle yet durable adhesive that includes latex-based components to ensure each plaster stays securely in place, even during physical activities, offering reliable protection throughout the day.
Highly Absorbent Pad: Features a cushioned, non-stick pad that absorbs wound exudate while preventing the plaster from sticking to the wound, promoting faster healing.
Hypoallergenic and Gentle on Skin: Suitable for all skin types, including sensitive skin, these plasters minimise the risk of irritation and allergic reactions.
Variety of Sizes: Available in multiple sizes to cover and protect different types of wounds, from minor cuts and scrapes to larger abrasions, ensuring you have the right plaster for every need.
description: Product Description Introducing Proplast Fabric Plasters, the perfect solution for everyday wound care. Crafted from soft, breathable fabric, these plasters provide exceptional comfort and flexibility, conforming to your skin’s movements. With strong adhesion, they stay securely in place even during physical activities, offering reliable protection all day long. The highly absorbent, cushioned pad absorbs wound exudate while preventing the plaster from sticking to the wound, promoting faster healing. Hypoallergenic and gentle on all skin types, including sensitive skin, these plasters minimise the risk of irritation and allergic reactions. Available in a variety of sizes, Proplast Fabric Plasters ensure you have the right protection for every cut, scrape, and abrasion. Directions Gently clean the wound and apply the ProPlast fabric dressing in a way that conforms to the contour of the wound, taking advantage of its flexibility and comfort. Firmly secure the dressing with the strong adhesion it offers, making sure it does not stick to the wound thanks to the highly absorbent padded pad. Please note that the dressing is hypoallergenic and suitable for all skin types, including sensitive skin.
